text: The surgeon inserts a trocar directly into the cyst and aspirates its contents, visibly reducing the cyst size.

The surgeon places mattress sutures to close the vaginal vault, starting with suturing the right angle and then the left angle. After completing the sutures, the rectum is tested for leakage. The right ureter is visible in the surgical field.
